channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Admiral Naveed Ashraf affirms Pakistan’s defence readiness and highlights military progress
item.description: The Chief of Naval Staff of Pakistan, Admiral Naveed Ashraf, reaffirmed on Tuesday that Pakistan’s armed forces are prepared to deter any aggression and deliver a firm response if required. Speaking a...

item.title: LAUSD schools to remain open after tentative agreements with unions avert strike
item.description: The Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) will remain open on Tuesday after reaching a series of tentative agreements with three major employee unions, effectively averting a potential strike. L...

item.title: A former children’s entertainer reflects on the joy of working with kids and the challenges posed by parents
item.description: The article is a personal reflection from a former children’s entertainer who worked between the ages of 16 and 22, performing at parties as a fairy and other themed characters such as witches, prince...

item.title: PM Shehbaz to visit Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Turkiye for diplomatic talks amid regional tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif of Pakistan is expected to undertake an important three-nation diplomatic visit covering Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Turkiye, as the government steps up engagement amid esca...

item.title: Trump-Pope Leo clash raises political risks for US midterm elections
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s public dispute with Pope Leo XIV has created fresh political tension in the United States, with potential fallout for his support base ahead of the upcoming midterm electio...

item.title: Nedbank confirmed as platinum partner for 2026 Top Empowerment Conference focused on transformation and inclusive growth
item.description: The 2026 Nedbank Top Empowerment Conference and Awards will take place on 17 and 18 June 2026 at the Sandton Convention Centre, with Nedbank returning as Platinum Partner. The event comes at a signifi...

item.title: Jackie learns from Marielle’s advice on becoming TNT-coded performer
item.description: In a recent episode of ABS-CBN’s hit noontime show 'It’s Showtime,' host Jackie shared a lighthearted moment about receiving an important tip from co-host Marielle Rodriguez-Padilla. The advice center...

item.title: Carney's Majority Government: Opportunity and Challenges Ahead
item.description: Following recent by-election victories, Prime Minister Mark Carney and his Liberal government now hold a majority, granting them a significant degree of freedom and power until 2029. The article explo...

item.title: Treasury proposes law to stop duplication and stalled public projects in Kenya
item.description: The National Treasury is working on a new Bill aimed at tackling the long-standing problem of stalled and duplicated public projects across Kenya, commonly referred to as white elephant projects. The ...

item.title: WeatherBug Study Finds October 8 Has the Most Pleasant U.S. Weather
item.description: For decades, popular culture has humorously labeled April 25 as the “perfect date,” popularized by a line in the movie Miss Congeniality suggesting that a light jacket is all one needs on that day. Ho...

item.title: Government to simplify business registration to support women entrepreneurs in Tanzania
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening women entrepreneurs by simplifying business formalisation processes and removing administrative barriers that often hinder bus...

item.title: Century-old museum fossil confirms giant echidnas once lived in Victoria
item.description: A previously overlooked fossil fragment has revealed that giant echidnas once inhabited Victoria, filling a major gap in Australia’s prehistoric record. The discovery was made when Museums Victoria Re...

item.title: Global Health Body Warns of Rising Diet-Related Health Risks in India
item.description: A recent scientific statement by the American Heart Association (AHA) has raised a serious alarm regarding the increasing reliance on ultra-processed foods and its detrimental impact on public health,...

item.title: Soweto child hospitalised after E.coli infection linked to contaminated tap water
item.description: A seven-year-old girl from Dube in Soweto, Nonjabulo Sabatha, was hospitalised after falling seriously ill from drinking tap water contaminated with E.coli. The Grade 1 learner had been suffering from...

item.title: Stanbic Bank Tanzania’s Neemarose Singo listed among Africa’s top 100 marketing leaders
item.description: Neemarose Singo, who serves as the Head of Brand and Marketing at Stanbic Bank Tanzania, has been recognised among Africa’s most influential marketing professionals in the inaugural Africa CMO 100 (AC...

item.title: Manas Mangaraj appointed as BJD's leader in Rajya Sabha after internal leadership transition
item.description: The Biju Janata Dal (BJD), Odisha’s ruling political party, has nominated senior leader Manas Mangaraj as its new head in the Rajya Sabha, signalling a significant reshuffle within its parliamentary l...

item.title: Jon Stewart Condemns Trump and Rubio’s UFC Outing Amid Iran Peace Talks
item.description: Comedian and 'The Daily Show' host Jon Stewart strongly criticized President Donald Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio for attending a UFC fight the same day high-stakes negotiations with Iran w...

item.title: Fans criticise disparity between Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter's Coachella performances and pay
item.description: Justin Bieber made his return to live performance at Coachella 2026, but his low-key approach has sparked heated debate online. The Canadian singer, who reportedly earned $10 million for his headline ...

item.title: Collective Investment Schemes Drive Financial Inclusion and Capital Market Growth in Tanzania
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, Tanzania’s capital markets are increasingly being recognised as an important channel for promoting inclusive wealth creation and expanding access to formal financial services. Collec...
